prestazioni: Engine: Honda K24Z7 (2.4L i-VTEC) with forged internals including JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs (12.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 300+ hp on E85 with a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) and custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifold by TurboSmart

Suspension: Öhlins TTX22M 2-way adjustable coilovers with 300mm travel, reinforced spherical bearing top mounts, and custom valving for 10" of articulation, paired with Polybush polyurethane bushings for the tubular spaceframe chassis

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in a custom 4.875:1 final drive ratio Salisbury differential housing, with a Tilton 5.5" twin-plate clutch and a custom 6-speed sequential gearbox by Hewland (FT200) with paddle-shift actuation via Motec PDM15

Fuel System: Fore Innovations 450LPH dual-pump surge tank with ID1000x injectors, Aeromotive A1000 fuel pressure regulator, and a custom 3" aluminum fuel cell with internal baffling for extreme angles
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber tactical body kit by RML Group, including a modular front bumper with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch and D-ring mounts, rear swing-arm mounted spare tire carrier with RotopaX 5-gallon fuel/water cells, and a lightweight carbon fiber hardtop with integrated roof rack by Front Runner Outfitters

Lighting: Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED light bar (50" width) with amber fog covers, Baja Designs Squadron-R Pro auxiliary lights (4x 4" pods), and custom LED rock lights by Diode Dynamics with IP68 waterproofing and 3M Scotchlite reflective accents

Interior: Sparco Pro 2000 seats with 5-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II 6-point for driver), custom aluminum dashboard with Motec C127 digital dash, and a full roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 3.2mm wall thickness) with integrated Molle panel mounts for tactical gear storage
